utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Cause I figured you would hooked up with some girl and she would left it there .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes that would have made more sense .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know , I ... I do not even feel like I know you anymore man !

emotion_cause.span: 4_I ... I do not even feel like I know you anymore man !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right , look , I am just gonna ask you this one time .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And whatever you say , I will believe you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Were you , or were you not on a gay cruise ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_Were you , or were you not on a gay cruise ?
